title: My Smol Site
description: This is a site to help people make one-page sites, resurrecting Clippy in the form of the cartoon character from the Loki series.

analysis.title: smol site | Tiny sites for your ginormous ideas

bodyText.text: We all need websites. smol site helps you create a really tiny one in minutes with zero effort. Plus, you can make edits
